jasperReport.name: depreciacionMes
jasperReport.queryString: select rtrim(ltrim(cat.ACdescripcion)) AS ACdescripcion, rtrim(ltrim(cla.ACdescripcion)) as clasedescripcion, b.CFid, b.AFSid, round(AFSvaladq,2) as AFSvaladq, AFSvalmej,AFSvalrev, AFSdepacumadq, AFSdepacummej, AFSdepacumrev , rtrim(cf.CFcodigo) as CFcodigo , rtrim(ltrim(cf.CFdescripcion)) as CFdescripcion , c.Edescripcion as Edescripcion , a.Aplaca , convert(varchar,a.Afechainidep,103) as Afechainidep , a.Avutil, substring(a.Adescripcion,1,30) as Adescripcion , cla.ACcodigodesc, cat.ACcodigodesc as categoria from Activos a inner join AFSaldos b on b.Ecodigo = a.Ecodigo and b.Aid = a.Aid and (b.CFid = $P{Centro} or $P{Centro} = 0) and b.AFSperiodo = $P{Periodo} and b.AFSmes = $P{Mes} inner join ACategoria cat on cat.Ecodigo = a.Ecodigo and cat.ACcodigo = a.ACcodigo and (cat.ACcodigo = $P{Categoria} or $P{Categoria} = 0) inner join AClasificacion cla on cla.Ecodigo = a.Ecodigo and cla.ACcodigo = a.ACcodigo and cla.ACid = a.ACid and (cla.ACcodigo = $P{Categoria} or $P{Categoria} = 0) and (cla.ACid = $P{Clase} or $P{Clase} = 0) ,Empresas c ,CFuncional cf where a.Ecodigo = $P{Ecodigo} and (b.CFid = $P{Centro} or $P{Centro} = 0) and a.Ecodigo = c.Ecodigo and b.CFid = cf.CFid order by 3,2,1
